No appearance.

ORDER SIGNED in open court.

Matthew A. Goodin, Esq. of Epstein Becker & Green P.C., Tel. No. 415.399.6021, appearing for the Plaintiff First Republic Bank;
Peter Rukin, Esq. of Rukin Hyland, Tel. No. 415.421.1800, appearing for Defendant Anne Kelny Denebeim.

Both sides stipulate that the matter can be heard by Judge Pro Tem Thomas A. Cohen.

Matter called, parties and the Court hold discussions/meet and confer.

Plaintiff First Republic Bank's Motion Regarding Its Motion To Compel: (1) Defendants Further Responses And Production To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; (2) Defendants Further Answers To Interrogatories, Set One; And (3) Request For Monetary Sanctions has resolved.
